aiSummary: David Miller is a QVC Platinum Member and 'Gourmet Tech Enthusiast' who frequently shops for high-end kitchenware and home technology. Currently, he is looking for summer entertaining essentials and has shown interest in upcoming Ninja kitchen appliance launches. The concierge should focus on providing tailored recommendations for patio living and kitchen upgrades.
